primarySource.name: Synthea Sample CSV (synthetic EHR)
primarySource.license: CC0 / Apache-2.0 style synthetic data — no real PHI
primarySource.note: MIMIC-IV labevents requires PhysioNet credentialed access (CITI). GoMask full export requires signup. Synthea is openly downloadable and records all ordered labs including normal values.

secondarySource.name: GoMask Lab Test Results (public preview schema)
secondarySource.note: Full 200-row download requires account; schema used for mapping. Values not bulk-imported beyond published preview.

meta.policy: Values are ONLY sampled from imported dataset rows. Reference ranges are used solely to label normal/abnormal for filtering — never to invent values.
